news.title: Oil plunges below $100 on hopes of US-Iran Hormuz deal
news.summary: Oil prices dropped back below $100 a barrel on Monday and stock markets rallied as investors raised expectations of a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz following signs that Washington and Iran were edging closer to a deal.But many investors are betting Trump is eager to declare an accord that would see Gulf tanker traffic resume through the Strait of Hormuz -- and help ease fuel prices ahead of the summer tourism season.
